---
title: "PhysMove: Movement Patterns"
author: "Hannah Calich, Jorge Rodríguez, Víctor Eguíluz & Ana Sequeira"
date: "Last updated: `r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  officedown::rdocx_document:
    reference_docx: "template.docx"
    plots:
      style: Figure
      align: center
    tables:
      style: Table
vignette: |
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}  
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{PhysMove: Introduction}  
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
---
<style>
      img {border: 0;}
</style>
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(dpi = 600, 
                      fig.align = 'center', 
                      echo = TRUE,
                      collapse = TRUE,
                      fig.path = "images/",
                      comment = "#>") 
```

<img src="../vignettes/PhysMoveHex.png" align="right" width="130" />

```{r load physmove movement vignette, echo=FALSE}
# Load PhysMove
library(PhysMove)
```
 
```{r calcualte_rms, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
# Calculate RMS values with default parameters
rms.result <- rms(tracks)
```
  
```{r summarise rms results, echo=TRUE, eval=FALSE}
# Summarise RMS results
summary(rms.result[["rmsResults"]])
```

```{r summary rms, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE,  eval=FALSE} 
library(kableExtra)

table <- as.data.frame.matrix(summary(rms.result[["rmsResults"]]))
row.names(table) <- NULL

table %>%
    kable("html", align="l") %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed"), full_width = F, html_font = "Consolas", font_size = 35) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(1:2, width_min = "400px") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(3, width_min = "1385px") %>%
    kableExtra::row_spec(0:nrow(table), background = "#F8F8F8", color = "#60a0b0", extra_css = "padding-top: 0px !important; padding-bottom: 0px !important") %>%
    kableExtra::save_kable("vignettes/word_formatted/tables/summary_rms.png", zoom=1) # html files cant be output to word
```

```{r calculate hurst exponent, echo=TRUE,  eval=FALSE}
# Summarise linear model results and identify the Hurst exponent 
RMSlinearModel <- rms.result[["lm"]]
print(RMSlinearModel)
```

```{r rms lm, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, eval=FALSE} 
library(kableExtra)

table <- as.data.frame.matrix(RMSlinearModel)
row.names(table) <- NULL

table %>%
    kable("html", align="l") %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed"), full_width = F, html_font = "Consolas", font_size = 35) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(1, width_min = "585px") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(2:4, width_min = "400px") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(5, width_min = "400px") %>%
    kableExtra::row_spec(0:nrow(table), background = "#F8F8F8", color = "#60a0b0", extra_css = "padding-top: 0px !important; padding-bottom: 0px !important") %>%
    kableExtra::save_kable("vignettes/word_formatted/tables/rms_lm.png", zoom=1) # html files cant be output to word
```

```{r hurst est, echo=TRUE, eval=FALSE}
# Determine the Hurst exponent 
RMSlinearModel$estimate[2]
```

```{r hurst rms, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, eval=FALSE} 
library(kableExtra)

table <- as.data.frame(RMSlinearModel$estimate[2])
row.names(table) <- NULL

table %>%
    kable("html", align="l") %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed"), full_width = F, html_font = "Consolas", font_size = 35) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(1, width_min = "2185px") %>%
    kableExtra::row_spec(0:nrow(table), background = "#F8F8F8", color = "#60a0b0", extra_css = "padding-top: 0px !important; padding-bottom: 0px !important") %>%
    kableExtra::save_kable("vignettes/word_formatted/tables/hurst.png", zoom=1) # html files cant be output to word
```

```{r calc disp, echo=TRUE}
# Calculate displacements with default parameters
disp.all <- calcDisp(tracks)
```

```{r sum disp from 1st time window, echo=TRUE}
# Summarise displacements calculated over 24 ± 6 hours
summary(unlist(disp.all[[1]]))
```

```{r summary disp 1, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE} 
library(kableExtra)

table <- unclass(summary(unlist(disp.all[[1]])))
table <- data.frame(t(table))
names(table) <- c( "Min.", "1st Qu.", "Median", "Mean", "3rd Qu.", "Max.")

table %>%
    kable("html", align="l") %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed"), full_width = F, html_font = "Consolas", font_size = 35) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(1:5, width_min = "300px", include_thead = T) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(6, width_min = "685px") %>%
    kableExtra::row_spec(0:nrow(table), background = "#F8F8F8", color = "#60a0b0", extra_css = "padding-top: 0px !important; padding-bottom: 0px !important") %>%
    kableExtra::save_kable("vignettes/word_formatted/tables/summary_disp_all_24.png", zoom=1) # html files cant be output to word
```

```{r plot_all_norm_disp, echo=TRUE, error=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width = 5}
# Create a pdf plot of normalized displacements
plot.data <- plotDispPDF(disp.all)
```
 
```{r plot_all_disp_not_norm, echo=TRUE, error=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width = 5}
# Create a pdf plot of raw (i.e., not normalized) displacements
plot.data.norm <- plotDispPDF(disp.all, normalised=FALSE)
```

```{r calc disp over 24 hours, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE}
# Calculate displacements over 24 ± 6 hours
disp <- calcDisp(tracks, max_hr=24)
```

```{r summarise disp over 24 hours, echo=TRUE}
# Summarise displacements
summary(unlist(disp))
```

```{r summary disp 24, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE} 
library(kableExtra)

table <- unclass(summary(unlist(disp)))
table <- data.frame(t(table))
names(table) <- c( "Min.", "1st Qu.", "Median", "Mean", "3rd Qu.", "Max.")

table %>%
    kable("html", align="l") %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed"), full_width = F, html_font = "Consolas", font_size = 35) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(1:5, width_min = "300px") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(6, width_min = "685px") %>%
    kableExtra::row_spec(0:nrow(table), background = "#F8F8F8", color = "#60a0b0", extra_css = "padding-top: 0px !important; padding-bottom: 0px !important") %>%
    kableExtra::save_kable("vignettes/word_formatted/tables/summary_disp24.png", zoom=1) # html files cant be output to word
```

```{r plot_24hr_disp, echo=TRUE, error=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width = 5}
# Plot displacements (as displacements were only calculated over one time window they do not need to be normalised)
plot.data.pdf <- plotDispPDF(disp, normalised=FALSE)
```

```{r fit full dist, echo=TRUE}
# Fit all distributions to the full range of displacement data 
distResults <- fitDist(disp, full=TRUE, normalise=FALSE) 
```

```{r full dist summary, echo=TRUE}
distResults[["distResults"]]
```

```{r dist full, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE} 
library(kableExtra)

table <- as.data.frame.matrix(distResults[["distResults"]])
row.names(table) <- NULL

table %>%
    kable("html", align="l") %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed"), full_width = F, html_font = "Consolas", font_size = 35) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(1:4, width_min = "400px") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(5, width_min = "585px") %>%
    kableExtra::row_spec(0:nrow(table), background = "#F8F8F8", color = "#60a0b0", extra_css = "padding-top: 0px !important; padding-bottom: 0px !important") %>%
    kableExtra::save_kable("vignettes/word_formatted/tables/dist_full.png", zoom=1) # html files cant be output to word
```

```{r plot_full_dist, echo=TRUE, error=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width = 5}
# Create a ccdf plot of displacements with fit lines illustrating distributions fit to the full range of displacements
plot.data.all.pdf <- plotDist(disp, distResults, label="Displacements (km)")
```

```{r comp dist fits, echo=TRUE}
# Identify the best-fit distribution for the full range of displacement data
compResults <- compDist(disp, distResults)
compResults
```

```{r dist full comp, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE} 
library(kableExtra)

table <- as.data.frame.matrix(compResults)
row.names(table) <- NULL

table %>%
    kable("html", align="l") %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed"), full_width = F, html_font = "Consolas", font_size = 35) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(1:6, width_min = "300px") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(7, width_min = "385px") %>%
    kableExtra::row_spec(0:nrow(table), background = "#F8F8F8", color = "#60a0b0", extra_css = "padding-top: 0px !important; padding-bottom: 0px !important") %>%
    kableExtra::save_kable("vignettes/word_formatted/tables/dist_full_comp.png", zoom=1) # html files cant be output to word
```

```{r find best-fit xmin for each dist, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE}
# Fit all distributions and identify the best-fit xmin for each distribution
distResults.trunc <- fitDist(disp, full=FALSE, normalise=FALSE)
print(distResults.trunc[["distResults"]])
```

```{r dist trunc, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE} 
library(kableExtra)

table <- as.data.frame.matrix(distResults.trunc[["distResults"]])
row.names(table) <- NULL

table %>%
    kable("html", align="l") %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed"), full_width = F, html_font = "Consolas", font_size = 35) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(1:4, width_min = "400px") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(5, width_min = "585px") %>%
    kableExtra::row_spec(0:nrow(table), background = "#F8F8F8", color = "#60a0b0", extra_css = "padding-top: 0px !important; padding-bottom: 0px !important") %>%
    kableExtra::save_kable("vignettes/word_formatted/tables/dist_trunc.png", zoom=1) # html files cant be output to word
```

```{r plot_trunc_dist, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, fig.width = 5}
# Create a ccdf plot of displacements with fit lines illustrating distributions
# fit to the best-fit xmin for each distribution
plot.data.all.trunc <- plotDist(disp, distResults.trunc, label = "Displacements (km)")
```

```{r fit dist with pl, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE}
# Fit all distributions using the xmin value for the power-law distribution
xmin <- distResults.trunc[["distResults"]][1,2]
distResultsPl <- fitDist(disp, set_xmin=xmin, normalise=FALSE)
```

```{r fit dist with exp, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE}
# Fit all distributions using the xmin value for the exponential distribution
xmin <- distResults.trunc[["distResults"]][2,2]
distResultsExp <- fitDist(disp, set_xmin=xmin, normalise=FALSE)
```

```{r fit dist with lnorm, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE}
# Fit all distributions using the xmin value for the lognormal distribution
xmin <- distResults.trunc[["distResults"]][3,2]
distResultsLnorm <- fitDist(disp, set_xmin=xmin, normalise=FALSE)
```

```{r comp pl, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE}
# Compare distribution fits based on the best-fit xmin value for the power-law distribution
compResultsPl <- compDist(disp, distResultsPl)
compResultsPl
```

```{r comp results pl, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE} 
library(kableExtra)

table <- as.data.frame.matrix(compResultsPl)
row.names(table) <- NULL

table %>%
    kable("html", align="l") %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed"), full_width = F, html_font = "Consolas", font_size = 35) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(1:6, width_min = "300px") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(7, width_min = "385px") %>%
    kableExtra::row_spec(0:nrow(table), background = "#F8F8F8", color = "#60a0b0", extra_css = "padding-top: 0px !important; padding-bottom: 0px !important") %>%
    kableExtra::save_kable("vignettes/word_formatted/tables/dist_pl_comp.png", zoom=1) # html files cant be output to word
```

```{r comp exp, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE}
# Compare distribution fits based on the best-fit xmin value for the exponential distribution
compResultsExp <- compDist(disp, distResultsExp)
compResultsExp
```

```{r comp results exp, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE} 
library(kableExtra)

table <- as.data.frame.matrix(compResultsExp)
row.names(table) <- NULL

table %>%
    kable("html", align="l") %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed"), full_width = F, html_font = "Consolas", font_size = 35) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(1:6, width_min = "300px") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(7, width_min = "385px") %>%
    kableExtra::row_spec(0:nrow(table), background = "#F8F8F8", color = "#60a0b0", extra_css = "padding-top: 0px !important; padding-bottom: 0px !important") %>%
    kableExtra::save_kable("vignettes/word_formatted/tables/dist_exp_comp.png", zoom=1) # html files cant be output to word
```

```{r comp lnorm, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE}
# Compare distribution fits based on the best-fit xmin value for the lognormal distribution
compResultsLnorm <- compDist(disp, distResultsLnorm)
compResultsLnorm
```

```{r comp results lnorm, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE} 
library(kableExtra)

table <- as.data.frame.matrix(compResultsLnorm)
row.names(table) <- NULL

table %>%
    kable("html", align="l") %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed"), full_width = F, html_font = "Consolas", font_size = 35) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(1:6, width_min = "300px") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(7, width_min = "385px") %>%
    kableExtra::row_spec(0:nrow(table), background = "#F8F8F8", color = "#60a0b0", extra_css = "padding-top: 0px !important; padding-bottom: 0px !important") %>%
    kableExtra::save_kable("vignettes/word_formatted/tables/dist_lnorm_comp.png", zoom=1) # html files cant be output to word
```

```{r randomise_tracks, echo=TRUE, error=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Randomise() involves random number selection, so setting a seed enables the replication of results
set.seed(1)
# Randomise tracks from the tracks dataset with default parameters
randomise.result <- randomise(tracks)
```

```{r view random results, echo=TRUE}
# Summarise RMS results
summary(randomise.result[["resultsDF"]])
```

```{r summary randomise, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE} 
library(kableExtra)

table <- as.data.frame.matrix(summary(randomise.result[["resultsDF"]]))
row.names(table) <- NULL

table %>%
    kable("html", align="l") %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed"), full_width = F, html_font = "Consolas", font_size = 35) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(1:2, width_min = "450px") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(3, width_min = "1285px") %>%
    kableExtra::row_spec(0:nrow(table), background = "#F8F8F8", color = "#60a0b0", extra_css = "padding-top: 0px !important; padding-bottom: 0px !important") %>%
    kableExtra::save_kable("vignettes/word_formatted/tables/summary_randomise.png", zoom=1) # html files cant be output to word
```

```{r lm of randomised results, echo=TRUE}
# Determine the slope of the linear model
RandomiselinearModel <- randomise.result[["lm"]]
print(RandomiselinearModel)
```

```{r randomise lm, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE} 
library(kableExtra)

table <- as.data.frame.matrix(RandomiselinearModel)
row.names(table) <- NULL

table %>%
    kable("html", align="l") %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed"), full_width = F, html_font = "Consolas", font_size = 35) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(1, width_min = "585px") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(2:4, width_min = "400px") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(5, width_min = "400px") %>%
    kableExtra::row_spec(0:nrow(table), background = "#F8F8F8", color = "#60a0b0", extra_css = "padding-top: 0px !important; padding-bottom: 0px !important") %>%
    kableExtra::save_kable("vignettes/word_formatted/tables/randomise_lm.png", zoom=1) # html files cant be output to word
```

```{r slope of randomised results, echo=TRUE}
# Determine the slope without displaying the full linear model summary
RandomiselinearModel$estimate[2]
```

```{r randomise exp, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE} 
library(kableExtra)

table <- as.data.frame(RandomiselinearModel$estimate[2])
row.names(table) <- NULL

table %>%
    kable("html", align="l") %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed"), full_width = F, html_font = "Consolas", font_size = 35) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(1, width_min = "2185px") %>%
    kableExtra::row_spec(0:nrow(table), background = "#F8F8F8", color = "#60a0b0", extra_css = "padding-top: 0px !important; padding-bottom: 0px !important") %>%
    kableExtra::save_kable("vignettes/word_formatted/tables/randomise_exp.png", zoom=1) # html files cant be output to word
```

```{r plot_random_tracks, echo=TRUE, error=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width = 5}
# Plot random tracks for tracks dataset reference id 1
plot.data.random.tracks <- plotRandomTracks(tracks, ref=1, randomise.result)
```

```{r turn_angles, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE}
# Calculate turning angles in the tracks dataset using default parameters
angle.results <- turningAngles(tracks)

```
  
```{r summarise turning angles, echo=TRUE}
# Summarise turning angles calculated over the first time window 
summary(angle.results[[1]])
```

```{r summary angles, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE} 
library(kableExtra)

table <- unclass(summary(angle.results[[1]]))
table <- data.frame(t(table))
names(table) <- c( "Min.", "1st Qu.", "Median", "Mean", "3rd Qu.", "Max.")

table %>%
    kable("html", align="l") %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed"), full_width = F, html_font = "Consolas", font_size = 35) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(1:5, width_min = "300px") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(6, width_min = "685px") %>%
    kableExtra::row_spec(0:nrow(table), background = "#F8F8F8", color = "#60a0b0", extra_css = "padding-top: 0px !important; padding-bottom: 0px !important") %>%
    kableExtra::save_kable("vignettes/word_formatted/tables/summary_angles.png", zoom=1) # html files cant be output to word
```

```{r plot_angles_circle_plot, echo=TRUE, error=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width = 5}
# Plot angles with a circle plot
plot.data.angles <- plotAngles(angle.results)
```
